# Pursue Networking

> Pursue Networking is a Business Networking serving Atlanta, GA. Service area: Atlanta, East Point, Marietta, Smyrna, Buford. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.
